title: Mar Mar's Rotten planks & logs
description:
Enhance your ports and coasts with a mossy variant of (almost) every wood type.
Build the ruins of a civilization, or a rainy forest, the decision is yours.
body:
## Tittle
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_0a499d8a-ac92-4925-83e1-690fddc0ee11.png)
With _Mar Mar´s Rotten planks & logs_, (almost) every wood-like block of vanilla has got a new "rotten" variant, acting like _Mossy cobblestone_ for the _Cobblestone_ block.
***

## Main additions
- Almost every wood type of vanilla got a rotten variant. This includes:
   - **logs**
   - **stripped logs**
   - **planks**
   - **stairs**
   - **slabs**
   - **fences** and **fence gates**
   - **buttons** and **pressure plates**
- The blocks excluded of this list are:
   - **doors**
   - **trapdoors**
***

## Legal information
- _Mar Mar's Rotten planks & logs_ works under the MIT license, you can find a copy [here](https://opensource.org/license/MIT).
- You can use this mod on any modpack, besides if is published on CurseForge or not.
